arts.ttl: Liverpool suffer injury scare as Trent Alexander-Arnold replaced against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold was forced off through injury not long after Darwin Nunez had given Liverpool the lead against Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt new injury concern as Arne Slot forced into early change against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Liverpool right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold is forced off inside the first 25 minutes of the Reds' Premier League clash with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold forced OFF in Liverpool match to give Arne Slot injury headache
arts.sum: Liverpool were forced into a change early on in their Premier League match against Aston Villa with manager Arne Slot left sweating on the fitness of Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: LIVE: In-form Liverpool face high flying Aston Villa
arts.sum: Anfield hosts what could be a mouthwatering clash, as Liverpool look to keep top spot in the Premier League. ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Aston Villa eyeing up double deal with Real Betis, one player also wanted by Tottenham
arts.sum: Aston Villa have looked to the La Liga market with regularity since the arrival of Unai Emery, and they could do so again as they consider the possible signings of Real Betis defender Diego Llorente and midfielder Johnny Cardoso. arts.ttl: Big blow as latest report claims contract talks with Liverpool star have now stalled
arts.sum: According to the latest report, contract talks with Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold have now stalled. This is because, as per the report, the club are unwilling to offer him a higher wage than Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk, two other key players’ whose contract expires this coming summer. arts.ttl: Manchester City considering January approach for Liverpool target with €60m asking price
arts.sum: Manchester City are stepping up their efforts to sign a replacement for Rodri Hernandez in January, and their attention is on Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi, who will be replacing the 2024 Ballon d’Or winner in Spain’s squad for the foreseeable future. arts.ttl: Why Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid transfer rumours are about to ramp up as Liverpool wait
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has still yet to sign a contract extension with Liverpool ahead of the winter transfer window opening amid reported interest from Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Liverpool confirmed as Unai Emery makes four changes to starting XI
arts.sum: Villa XI: Martinez, Konsa, Carlos, Pau, Digne, Onana, Tielemans, Bailey, Ramsey, Rogers, Watkins. Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action.
